name: arra-import-obsidian
description: Import edits from an Obsidian vault back into ARRA Oracle (round-trip — closes #938)

flags.--only-changed: Skip files whose content hash matches last-export state (default: on)
flags.--create-new: Create docs that have no arra_id (default: skip + warn)
flags.--delete-missing: Tombstone docs in state but missing from vault (default: off)
